full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: i have 4 pages to cover: paper summary, reproduction result, 2 ablations, failure mode, and reflection. two column format. how should i split the space roughly
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: N/A — layout planning. All report text is my own.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested ~half page for summary, ~3/4 page for reproduction, ~1 page for both ablations, ~3/4 page for failure, ~half page for reflection. I adjusted based on which sections had more to say.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked the final report fits within 4 pages.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: for the honest reflection section is it okay to say i couldnt implement warm starts or is that too negative to put in a report
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: N/A — all reflection text is my own.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Said yes absolutely include it — the exam instructions literally say 'what you could not implement'. Being specific about warm starts and nearest-neighbour WSS shows you read those sections of the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Re-read exam instructions: 'what you could not implement, what surprised you'. Matches.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Quick check on whether abstract is needed.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: does a 4 page technical report need an abstract or is that a waste of space in a short report
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Said a short abstract (2-3 sentences) helps the reader and does not waste space if kept concise. It also acts as a natural introduction to the paper context.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Included a short abstract in report.tex.

top_5_prompts.prompt: is it okay to say i couldnt implement warm starts or is that too negative
top_5_prompts.why_important: The reflection section is 3 marks. Knowing that honest limitations are specifically what the grader wants changed how I wrote it.

top_5_prompts.prompt: how should i split 4 pages across paper summary, reproduction, 2 ablations, failure mode, reflection
top_5_prompts.why_important: With a hard page limit, not planning the allocation means some required sections end up too thin.

top_5_prompts.prompt: does a 4 page report need an abstract or is it a waste of space
top_5_prompts.why_important: Small structural decision that affected the report layout.
